zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Lindsay於1435年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓時，她的父親John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres33歲，母親Joan Agnes Byres Stewart28歲。她於1459年1月20日與John Seton在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1496年3月11日在蘇格蘭度福利爾格倫卡爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Lindsay于1435年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安哈丁頓时，她的父亲John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres33岁，母亲Joan Agnes Byres Stewart28岁。她于1459年1月20日与John Seton在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1496年3月11日在苏格兰度福利爾格倫卡爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Lindsay was born in 1435, in Haddington, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres, was 33 and her mother, Joan Agnes Byres Stewart, was 28. She married John Seton on 20 January 1459, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 March 1496, in Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Lindsay est née en 1435, à Haddington, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Agnes Byres Stewart, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Seton le 20 janvier 1459, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1496, à Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Lindsay 1435 in Haddington, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres 33 und ihre Mutter Joan Agnes Byres Stewart 28. Sie hat am 20. Januar 1459 in Scotland John Seton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 11. März 1496 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lindsay è nata il nel 1435 nel Haddington, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan Agnes Byres Stewart, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Seton il 20 gennaio 1459, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 11 marzo 1496, nel Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Lindsayが1435年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンハッドイントンで生まれた時，父John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byresは33歳，母Joan Agnes Byres Stewartは28歳であった。1459年1月20日にスコットランドでJohn Setonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1496年3月11日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアグレンケイルンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Lindsay(이)가 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Agnes Byres Stewart(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1459년 1월 20일 스컷랜드에서 John Seton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1496년 3월 11일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 글렌카언에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lindsay nasceu em 1435, em Haddington, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Agnes Byres Stewart, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Seton em 20 de janeiro de 1459, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 11 de março de 1496, em Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Lindsay родилась в 1435 г. в местности хаддингтон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Agnes Byres Stewart, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Seton 20 января 1459 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 марта 1496 г. в местности гленкеирн, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Lindsay nació en 1435, en Haddington, East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Lindsay - First Lord of the Byres, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Agnes Byres Stewart, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Seton el 20 de enero de 1459, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1496, en Glencairn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años.
